description: The reference furniture of physical science: common element symbols, the SI base & derived units with the major physical constants, and the metric prefixes. Symbol-based decks are tested both ways.
primer:
## How this set works
Three decks of the most-used reference facts in physical science. Two of them (element symbols, metric prefixes) are studied **both ways** — symbol→name and name→symbol — and tracked separately. Everything you need to answer a card is on this chart.

## Element symbols (selected, by region of the table)
- **Alkali / alkaline-earth:** Li lithium · Be beryllium · Na sodium · Mg magnesium · K potassium · Ca calcium.
- **Transition metals:** Ti titanium · Cr chromium · Mn manganese · Fe iron · Co cobalt · Ni nickel · Cu copper · Zn zinc · Ag silver · Pt platinum · Au gold · Hg mercury.
- **Other metals:** Al aluminium · Sn tin · Pb lead · U uranium.
- **Non-metals & metalloids:** H hydrogen · B boron · C carbon · N nitrogen · O oxygen · Si silicon · P phosphorus · S sulfur.
- **Halogens:** F fluorine · Cl chlorine · Br bromine · I iodine.
- **Noble gases:** He helium · Ne neon · Ar argon · Kr krypton · Xe xenon · Rn radon.
- **Latin-derived symbols to watch:** Na (natrium), K (kalium), Fe (ferrum), Cu (cuprum), Ag (argentum), Sn (stannum), Au (aurum), Hg (hydrargyrum), Pb (plumbum).

## SI base units (7) — and what they measure
- metre (m) → length · kilogram (kg) → mass · second (s) → time · ampere (A) → electric current · kelvin (K) → temperature · mole (mol) → amount of substance · candela (cd) → luminous intensity.

## Key derived units
- newton N → force (kg·m/s²) · pascal Pa → pressure (N/m²) · joule J → energy (N·m) · watt W → power (J/s) · volt V → electric potential (J/C) · hertz Hz → frequency (1/s).

## Major physical constants
- speed of light c ≈ 3.00×10⁸ m/s · standard gravity g ≈ 9.81 m/s² · Avogadro Nₐ ≈ 6.02×10²³ /mol · Planck h ≈ 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s · elementary charge e ≈ 1.60×10⁻¹⁹ C.

## Metric (SI) prefixes
- **Multiples:** da deca 10¹ · h hecto 10² · k kilo 10³ · M mega 10⁶ · G giga 10⁹ · T tera 10¹² · P peta 10¹⁵ · E exa 10¹⁸.
- **Submultiples:** d deci 10⁻¹ · c centi 10⁻² · m milli 10⁻³ · μ micro 10⁻⁶ · n nano 10⁻⁹ · p pico 10⁻¹² · f femto 10⁻¹⁵ · a atto 10⁻¹⁸.

Every card's answer is on this chart — for the symbol decks, know it in both directions and you'll pass.
